headline: Rebuilding trust in communities: Allstate CEO Tom Wilson on the 2026 Trust in Practice Awards
summary: Allstate CEO Tom Wilson joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the 2026 Trust in Practice Awards, why there's been a decline in trust in the U.S., and more.
